purpose: Produce one numeric broad-market state benchmark, not a new Alpha discovery or strategy family.

state.decision_session: last available SPY row of each calendar month
state.moving_average: arithmetic mean of the latest 200 adj_close values including the decision close
state.trend_on: decision adj_close is strictly greater than the moving average
state.trend_off: decision adj_close is less than or equal to the moving average

execution.execution_session: next available SPY row after the month-end decision
execution.interval_return: target exposure times next execution adj_open divided by current execution adj_open minus one
execution.cost_application: multiply wealth by 1 minus one-way cost rate times absolute exposure change before interval return

combined_validation_holdout.composition: concatenate the separately evaluated validation and holdout monthly returns
combined_validation_holdout.boundary_cost_rule: each component split includes its own initial entry and final liquidation costs

splits.cross_split_interval: purge when execution and next execution do not both remain inside one split

comparators.B1_SPY_BUY_HOLD: 100 percent SPY throughout each evaluated split with entry and final liquidation costs
comparators.B2_SPY_200D_TREND_CASH: frozen state gate with cash outside TREND_ON

metric_formulas.cagr: compound monthly net wealth raised to 12 divided by complete_month_count minus one
metric_formulas.annualized_volatility: sample standard deviation of complete monthly net returns with ddof 1 times sqrt 12; zero when fewer than two months
metric_formulas.maximum_drawdown: minimum compounded wealth divided by prior running peak minus one, with initial wealth and peak equal to one
metric_formulas.calmar: cagr divided by absolute maximum_drawdown; null when maximum_drawdown equals zero
metric_formulas.positive_month_fraction: fraction of complete monthly net returns strictly greater than zero
metric_formulas.time_in_market: arithmetic mean of interval target exposure
metric_formulas.state_transition_count: count of target exposure changes between adjacent complete intervals, excluding initial entry and final liquidation
metric_formulas.one_way_turnover: absolute initial exposure plus adjacent absolute exposure changes plus absolute final liquidation
metric_formulas.cost_drag: terminal cumulative gross return minus terminal cumulative net return

primary_gates: holdout B2 maximum drawdown is strictly less severe than B1
holdout B2 Calmar is strictly greater than B1
combined validation plus holdout B2 CAGR >= 50 percent of B1 CAGR
combined validation plus holdout B2 time in market is between 20 and 90 percent inclusive
at 30 bps combined validation plus holdout B2 CAGR > 0
zero duplicate missing nonfinite or identity failures
stop_rule: Any failed gate produces RETROSPECTIVE_BASELINE_FAIL. Do not alter the 200-session window, add filters, change costs, or create another variant.
